specializedExpertise.title: ALS Concierge Nursing
specializedExpertise.shortDescription: Specialized nursing care for ALS patients with focus on respiratory support and mobility
specializedExpertise.description: Our ALS specialized nurses provide comprehensive care including respiratory management, mobility assistance, communication support, and nutritional monitoring. We work closely with neurologists and therapy teams to ensure optimal quality of life.
keyFeatures: Nutritional monitoring and feeding tube care

specializedExpertise.title: Alzheimer's Concierge Nursing
specializedExpertise.shortDescription: Compassionate memory care and cognitive support for Alzheimer's patients
specializedExpertise.description: Our Alzheimer's care specialists provide patient-centered care focusing on maintaining dignity, managing behavioral changes, and supporting cognitive function while ensuring safety and comfort.

specializedExpertise.title: Dementia Concierge Nursing
specializedExpertise.shortDescription: Expert care for all forms of dementia with personalized support plans
specializedExpertise.description: Comprehensive dementia care services tailored to the unique needs of each patient, focusing on quality of life, safety, and maintaining independence as long as possible.

specializedExpertise.title: Diabetes Management
specializedExpertise.shortDescription: Comprehensive diabetes care including monitoring, education, and lifestyle support
specializedExpertise.description: Our diabetes management program provides expert nursing care for Type 1 and Type 2 diabetes, including blood glucose monitoring, insulin administration, dietary counseling, and complication prevention.

specializedExpertise.title: Heart Disease Care
specializedExpertise.shortDescription: Specialized cardiac care and monitoring for heart disease patients
specializedExpertise.description: Comprehensive cardiac care services including post-surgical recovery, CHF management, arrhythmia monitoring, and cardiac rehabilitation support.

specializedExpertise.title: MS Concierge Nursing
specializedExpertise.shortDescription: Specialized care for Multiple Sclerosis patients managing symptoms and maintaining function
specializedExpertise.description: Our MS specialists provide comprehensive care addressing the complex needs of MS patients, including symptom management, medication administration, and maintaining quality of life.

specializedExpertise.title: Oncology Care
specializedExpertise.shortDescription: Compassionate cancer care supporting patients through treatment and recovery
specializedExpertise.description: Comprehensive oncology nursing services including chemotherapy support, symptom management, post-surgical care, and emotional support throughout the cancer journey.
keyFeatures: Chemotherapy and radiation side effect management

specializedExpertise.title: Ostomy Management
specializedExpertise.shortDescription: Expert ostomy care and education for optimal health and comfort
specializedExpertise.description: Specialized ostomy care services including stoma care, appliance management, skin protection, and patient education for independence.

specializedExpertise.title: Parkinson's Disease Care
specializedExpertise.shortDescription: Specialized care for Parkinson's patients focusing on mobility and quality of life
specializedExpertise.description: Comprehensive Parkinson's disease management including medication optimization, mobility support, and strategies to maintain independence and quality of life.

specializedExpertise.title: Stroke Recovery
specializedExpertise.shortDescription: Post-stroke rehabilitation and recovery support for optimal outcomes
specializedExpertise.description: Comprehensive stroke recovery services focusing on neurological rehabilitation, physical therapy support, and maximizing functional recovery.

specializedExpertise.title: Trauma-Related Injuries (TBI)
specializedExpertise.shortDescription: Specialized care for traumatic brain injury patients
specializedExpertise.description: Expert nursing care for TBI patients including cognitive support, behavioral management, and comprehensive rehabilitation assistance.

specializedExpertise.title: General Specialized Care
specializedExpertise.shortDescription: Customized nursing care for unique medical needs
specializedExpertise.description: Flexible, personalized nursing care services tailored to meet unique medical conditions and individual care requirements.

treatments.title: Cardiac and Pulmonary Oversight
treatments.shortDescription: Comprehensive cardiac and respiratory monitoring and management
treatments.description: Expert monitoring and management of cardiac and pulmonary conditions including heart failure, COPD, and post-surgical recovery.

treatments.title: Eating Disorders and Monitoring
treatments.shortDescription: Specialized nutritional support and monitoring for eating disorder recovery
treatments.description: Comprehensive care for eating disorder patients including nutritional monitoring, meal supervision, and behavioral support.

treatments.title: IV and Infusion Therapy
treatments.shortDescription: Professional IV therapy and infusion services in the comfort of home
treatments.description: Expert administration of IV medications, hydration therapy, nutritional support, and specialized infusions.

treatments.title: Mental Health Services
treatments.shortDescription: Comprehensive mental health support and crisis intervention
treatments.description: Mental health nursing services including medication management, crisis intervention, and therapeutic support.

treatments.title: Pain Management
treatments.shortDescription: Comprehensive pain management strategies for improved quality of life
treatments.description: Expert pain management services including medication administration, non-pharmacological interventions, and comfort measures.

treatments.title: Post-Op Recovery (Hospital to Home)
treatments.shortDescription: Seamless transition from hospital to home with expert post-surgical care
treatments.description: Comprehensive post-operative care ensuring smooth recovery including wound care, pain management, and monitoring for complications.

treatments.title: Rehab and Addiction Services
treatments.shortDescription: Supportive care for addiction recovery and rehabilitation
treatments.description: Compassionate nursing support for addiction recovery including medical monitoring, medication management, and relapse prevention.

treatments.title: General Treatment Services
treatments.shortDescription: Flexible treatment services for various medical needs
treatments.description: Comprehensive nursing treatments tailored to individual medical requirements and care goals.

neurological.name: Neurological Conditions
neurological.description: Specialized care for neurological and neurodegenerative conditions

chronic.name: Chronic Conditions
chronic.description: Long-term management of chronic health conditions

specialty.name: Specialty Care
specialty.description: Specialized nursing for specific medical needs
